name: Black Russian Bundt Cake
recipeInstructions:
CAKE: In a large mixing bowl, combine the cake ingredients. Mix at low speed for about 1 minute; beat at medium speed for 4 minutes. Pour into a greased and floured 10-inch bundt pan. Bake in a 350-degree oven until tested with a toothpick (60-70 minutes). Let cool in the pan for 10 minutes; then invert onto a rack or plate. Poke holes in the cake with the tines of a fork; slowly pour glaze over. Cool completely; dust with powdered sugar.
GLAZE: Combine the powdered sugar and liqueur; blend until smooth.
